backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, combining blob storage and authorization mixins to expose CRUD endpoints for gemstones, reviews, cart, booking requests, contact submissions, gallery items, social media links, and user profiles with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that date-related text was removed from the Vastu Advance Course entry in the Services page, with high confidence and a reference to the affected file.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short human-readable summaries describing the purpose and key details of each page or component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'ASTROMANIA by Vijay Sawkar' and mounting the app via the /src/main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider (dark default) and React Query, and renders the shared Header/Footer layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Accordion-based FAQ section with five pre-defined questions covering Kundali accuracy, Vastu correction timelines, gemstone selection, gemstone effectiveness, and online consultation availability.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer rendering brand info with logo, social media icon links, quick navigation links, a services list, and contact details including a clickable Google Maps link for the Margao office location.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, mobile menu toggle, and Internet Identity login/logout button using TanStack Router and React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for backend data including gemstones, reviews, cart, bookings, contacts, gallery, and user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS defining a deep cosmic dark theme with oklch color variables, Tailwind imports, custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Inter), and utility animations like twinkle, float, and glow-pulse.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page showcasing astrologer Vijay Sawkar's biography, credentials, stats, and expertise areas with a cosmic-themed layout and imagery.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: A consultation booking page with a form for selecting consultation type, mode, and personal details, which submits to the backend via a mutation hook and shows a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: A contact page with a message submission form, social/location info, and an admin-only gallery management section supporting image/video upload and deletion via the backend actor.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: A media gallery page combining static pre-seeded items with backend-uploaded images and videos, supporting filtering, a lightbox viewer, and admin upload/delete functionality.
frontend/src/pages/GemstoneShop.tsx: A gemstone shop page displaying nine Vedic gemstones with details, benefits, and weight options, allowing users to view a detail modal and initiate a WhatsApp inquiry.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The landing page showcasing Vijay Sawkar's astrology services, stats, and testimonials with links to booking and service pages.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Defines and renders the Services page listing offerings like Vedic Astrology, Vastu Shastra, Vastu Advance Course, Numerology, and Gemstone Therapy with details on pricing, duration, and modes.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Renders the Testimonials page displaying a grid of client reviews with star ratings, service tags, and quotes for services like Kundali Reading, Vastu Consultancy, and Gemstone Therapy.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, a cosmic color palette, shadows, background gradients, and keyframe animations for the frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including existing features and a pending action request (AR-1) to remove the date from the Vastu Advance Course section in the Services page.
